zh.St.Albans, Hertfordshire: 英國賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯
zh.St Albans, Hertfordshire, England: 英國賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey de Noel於1146年出生在英國賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯時，他的父親Robert Noell19歲，母親Lady Alice de Montfort20歲。他於1192年之前與Benedicta Chaney在英國結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.St.Albans, Hertfordshire: 英国賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯
zh-hans.St Albans, Hertfordshire, England: 英国賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffrey de Noel于1146年出生在英国賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯时，他的父亲Robert Noell19岁，母亲Lady Alice de Montfort20岁。他于1192年之前与Benedicta Chaney在英国结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Noel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pierre, Normand, Antoine, Jacques, Alphonse, Leonce, Lucien, Marcel, Damien, Emile, Francois.

French and Walloon (Noël); English: from the Old French personal name Noël, Middle English Noel, from Old French no(u)el ‘Christmas’ (from Latin natalis (dies) ‘birthday’), used for someone born during the Christmas period. Alternatively, a nickname for someone who had some special connection with the Christmas season, such as owing the particular feudal duty of providing a yule-log to the lord of the manor, or having given a memorable performance as the Lord of Misrule. This surname is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium. Compare Christmas and Newell .
English: sometimes a post-medieval variant of Knowle and Knoll (see Knowles ). The loss of /k/ before /n/ is known in everyday speech by the 17th century and may have been earlier.

variants.name: Nowell
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Noel  ,   Knowles  , or   Newell  .

variants.name: Christmas
meanings: English (southeastern): nickname from Middle English Criste(s)masse, -messe ‘Christmas Day’, also ‘the Christmas season’, perhaps for someone who was born at Christmas or one who played the part of the King of Christmas in Yuletide games. The name was also established in County Waterford, Ireland, in 1622.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French Noël (see Noel ).

variants.name: Nadal
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Miguel, Francisco, Jose, Luis, Caridad, Digna, Jaime, Juan, Juan Carlos, Manuel, Otilio.

Catalan and French (Occitan): from the personal name Nadal, from nadal ‘Christmas’ (from Latin natalis ‘birthday’), the name given to a child born on that day or during that time of year. Compare Noel .

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey de Noel was born in 1146, in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, his father, Robert Noell, was 19 and his mother, Lady Alice de Montfort, was 20. He married Benedicta Chaney before 1192, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey de Noel est né en 1146, à St Albans, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Noell, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice de Montfort, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Benedicta Chaney avant 1192, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey de Noel 1146 in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Noell 19 und seine Mutter Lady Alice de Montfort 20. Er hat vor 1192 in England Benedicta Chaney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey de Noel è nato il nel 1146 nel St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Noell, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alice de Montfort, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Benedicta Chaney prima del 1192, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.St Albans, Hertfordshire: イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイア
ja.St.Albans, Hertfordshire: イギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト アルバンス
ja.St Albans, Hertfordshire, England: イギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト アルバンス
ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Noelが1146年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト アルバンスで生まれた時，父Robert Noellは19歳，母Lady Alice de Montfortは20歳であった。1192年以前にイギリスでBenedicta Chaneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Noel(이)가 1146년 영국 허트퍼드실르 스트 알반스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Noell(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice de Montfort(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1192년 이전 영국에서 Benedicta Chaney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey de Noel nasceu em 1146, em St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Noell, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice de Montfort, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Benedicta Chaney antes 1192, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey de Noel родился в 1146 г. в местности ст албанс, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Noell было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice de Montfort, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Benedicta Chaney перед 1192 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffrey de Noel nació en 1146, en St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Noell, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Lady Alice de Montfort, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Benedicta Chaney antes de 1192, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en su pueblo.
